lessons.title: What is Apache Spark?
lessons.description: Driver, executors, lazy plans vs actions, and Spark as an execution engine—not storage.

lessons.title: Associative operations and partitioning
lessons.description: Why partial aggregation wants associative merges; subtraction, division, and coordination costs.

lessons.title: Spark and the DAG
lessons.description: Lineage vs execution: stages, shuffles, narrow vs wide work, and why the graph stays acyclic.

lessons.title: DAG × Spark: six lenses
lessons.description: The same DAG story from ELI5 through PM, CS foundations, junior/senior Spark, and theory.

lessons.title: DAGs in the real world
lessons.description: Dependencies everywhere—recipes, CI, packages, orchestration—and how Spark uses the same idea.

lessons.title: From scavenger hunt to marketplace
lessons.description: How governance turns data consumption from opaque discovery into a structured, trustworthy marketplace.
